full_text:
Empress Zhang 張皇后
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Empress Zhang (張皇后). Daughter of Zhang Ji. Empress to Cao Fang. Empress Zhang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
